'''gatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ascriptively|ascriptively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ascriptively|ascriptively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gatate|gatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gatatesher|gatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gatatesherĂ«m|gatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gatatero|gatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gatateshĂ«|gatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gatateshĂ«m|gatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigatatero|gokigatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigatateshĂ«|gokigatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigatateshĂ«m|gokigatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogatankerom|gogatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogatankeshĂ«|gogatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogatankeshĂ«m|gogatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogatankeya|gogatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gataterom|gataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gatatemu|gatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gatateya|gatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigataterom|gokigataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigatatemu|gokigatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigatateya|gokigatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gatatate|gatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gatatatesher|gatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gatatatesherĂ«m|gatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gatatatero|gatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gatatateshĂ«|gatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gatatateshĂ«m|gatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigatatatero|gokigatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigatatateshĂ«|gokigatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigatatateshĂ«m|gokigatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogatatankerom|gogatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogatatankeshĂ«|gogatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogatatankeshĂ«m|gogatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogatatankeya|gogatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gatataterom|gatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gatatatemu|gatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gatatateya|gatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigatataterom|gokigatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigatatatemu|gokigatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigatatateya|gokigatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠtĂŠte|gĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠtĂŠtesher|gĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠtĂŠtero|gĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠtĂŠtero|gokigĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠtĂŠteya|gĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠtĂŠteya|gokigĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gaftafte|gaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gaftaftesher|gaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gaftaftesherĂ«m|gaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gaftaftero|gaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gaftafteshĂ«|gaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gaftafteshĂ«m|gaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigaftaftero|gokigaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigaftafteshĂ«|gokigaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigaftafteshĂ«m|gokigaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogaftafnkerom|gogaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogaftafnkeshĂ«|gogaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogaftafnkeshĂ«m|gogaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogaftafnkeya|gogaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gaftafterom|gaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gaftaftemu|gaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gaftafteya|gaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigaftafterom|gokigaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigaftaftemu|gokigaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigaftafteya|gokigaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
